loader.HTML:
<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en">

<head>
    <meta charset="UTF-8">
    <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
    <meta name="myop:size" content='{"width":"100%","height":"100%"}'>
    <title>Billing Component</title>
    <link rel="preconnect" href="https://fonts.googleapis.com">
    <link rel="preconnect" href="https://fonts.gstatic.com" crossorigin>
    <link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=DM+Sans:wght@400;500;600;700&display=swap" rel="stylesheet">
    <style>
        :root {
            --surface-0: #1C1B1F;
            --white: #FFF;
            --purple-5: #F0E8FF;
            --purple-10: #DECCFF;
            --purple-dark: #4200B6;
            --grey-20: #D3D1D5;
            --dark-gradient: linear-gradient(266deg, #FF5B14 -2.48%, #715EF0 109.11%);
        }

        * {
            margin: 0;
            padding: 0;
            box-sizing: border-box;
        }

        body {
            font-family: 'DM Sans', sans-serif;
            background: #fafafa;
            min-height: 100%;
            color: var(--surface-0);
            overflow-y: auto;
            overflow-x: hidden;
        }

        /* Custom scrollbar styles - thin and light gray */
        * {
            scrollbar-width: thin;
            scrollbar-color: #d1d5db transparent;
        }

        *::-webkit-scrollbar {
            width: 6px;
            height: 6px;
        }

        *::-webkit-scrollbar-track {
            background: transparent;
        }

        *::-webkit-scrollbar-thumb {
            background-color: #d1d5db;
            border-radius: 3px;
        }

        *::-webkit-scrollbar-thumb:hover {
            background-color: #9ca3af;
        }

        /* Loader Styles */
        #loader-container {
            position: fixed;
            top: 0;
            left: 0;
            width: 100%;
            height: 100vh;
            display: flex;
            flex-direction: column;
            align-items: center;
            justify-content: center;
            background: #fafafa;
            z-index: 1000;
        }

        #loader-container.hidden {
            display: none;
        }

        .loader-spinner {
            width: 48px;
            height: 48px;
            border: 4px solid var(--purple-5);
            border-top-color: var(--purple-dark);
            border-radius: 50%;
            animation: spin 0.8s linear infinite;
        }

        .loader-text {
            margin-top: 16px;
            color: #6b7280;
            font-size: 14px;
        }

        @keyframes spin {
            to {
                transform: rotate(360deg);
            }
        }

        /* App Styles */
        #app-root {
            opacity: 0;
            transition: opacity 0.3s ease;
        }

        #app-root.visible {
            opacity: 1;
        }

        .billing-container {
            max-width: 1400px;
            margin: 0 auto;
            margin-left: 20px;
            margin-right: 20px;
            padding: 0;
        }

        .billing-title {
            font-family: 'DM Sans', sans-serif;
            font-size: 24px;
            font-weight: 400;
            line-height: 32px;
            color: var(--surface-0);
            margin: 0;
            width: 373px;
            height: 62px;
            padding: 19px 0 19px 0;
            text-align: left;
            border-bottom: none;
        }

        .billing-card {
            border-radius: 20px;
            background: linear-gradient(210deg, rgba(222, 204, 255, 0.20) 30.37%, #FFF3EF 81.86%);
            padding: 0;
            min-height: 500px;
            overflow: hidden;
        }

        .billing-header {
            display: flex;
            flex-direction: row;
            align-items: center;
            justify-content: space-between;
            padding: 32px 32px 0 32px;
            gap: 24px;
            position: relative;
        }

        .team-size-wrapper {
            position: static;
            transform: none;
            flex-shrink: 0;
        }

        .billing-period-toggle {
            position: static;
            display: flex;
            padding: 2px;
            border-radius: 8px;
            border: 1px solid var(--Grey-10, #E5E4E4);
            flex-shrink: 0;
            position: relative;
        }

        .toggle-slider {
            position: absolute;
            top: 2px;
            bottom: 2px;
            left: 2px;
            width: 61px;
            background: var(--White, #FFF);
            border-radius: 8px;
            box-shadow: 0 0 8px 0 rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.16);
            transition: transform 0.3s cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1);
            z-index: 0;
            pointer-events: none;
        }

        .billing-period-toggle.yearly .toggle-slider {
            transform: translateX(61px);
        }

        .toggle-option {
            position: relative;
            z-index: 1;
            padding: 0;
            width: 61px;
            height: 24px;
            line-height: 24px;
            text-align: center;
            border: none;
            background: transparent;
            border-radius: 100px;
            font-family: inherit;
            font-size: 11px;
            font-weight: 400;
            color: var(--Grey-90, #3E3D3E);
            cursor: pointer;
            transition: color 0.2s ease;
            white-space: nowrap;
            flex-shrink: 0;
        }

        .toggle-option.active {
            color: var(--surface-0);
        }

        .toggle-option:hover:not(.active) {
            color: var(--surface-0);
        }

        .current-plan-info {
            display: flex;
            flex-direction: row;
            align-items: baseline;
            gap: 8px;
            flex-shrink: 0;
        }

        .current-plan-label {
            font-family: inherit;
            font-size: 14px;
            font-weight: 400;
            color: var(--surface-0);
        }

        .current-plan-name {
            font-family: 'DM Sans', sans-serif;
            font-size: 14px;
            font-style: normal;
            font-weight: 600;
            line-height: 18px;
            color: var(--Grey-90, #3E3D3E);
        }

        .team-size-selector {
            display: flex;
            align-items: center;
            gap: 11px;
            flex-shrink: 0;
        }

        .team-size-label {
            font-family: 'DM Sans', sans-serif;
            font-size: 14px;
            font-style: normal;
            font-weight: 400;
            line-height: 18px;
            color: #5A595B;
        }

        .team-size-dropdown {
            position: relative;
            z-index: 10;
        }

        .dropdown-button {
            display: flex;
            align-items: center;
            justify-content: space-between;
            gap: 7px;
            background: var(--white);
            border: 1px solid var(--grey-20);
            border-radius: 7px;
            padding: 9px 14px;
            font-family: 'DM Sans', sans-serif;
            font-size: 13px;
            color: var(--surface-0);
            cursor: pointer;
            min-width: 108px;
            flex-shrink: 0;
        }

        .dropdown-button:focus {
            outline: none;
            border-color: var(--grey-20);
        }

        .dropdown-button.open {
            border-color: var(--grey-20);
            border-bottom-left-radius: 0;
            border-bottom-right-radius: 0;
        }

        .dropdown-arrow {
            width: 0;
            height: 0;
            border-left: 4.5px solid transparent;
            border-right: 4.5px solid transparent;
            border-top: 4.5px solid #6b7280;
            transition: transform 0.2s;
        }

        .dropdown-button.open .dropdown-arrow {
            transform: rotate(180deg);
        }

        .dropdown-menu {
            position: absolute;
            top: 100%;
            left: 0;
            right: 0;
            background: var(--white);
            border: 1px solid var(--grey-20);
            border-top: none;
            border-bottom-left-radius: 7px;
            border-bottom-right-radius: 7px;
            max-height: 0;
            overflow: hidden;
            opacity: 0;
            transition: max-height 0.2s, opacity 0.2s;
            z-index: 100;
            display: flex;
            flex-direction: column;
            gap: 2px;
            padding: 4px;
        }

        .dropdown-menu.open {
            max-height: 400px;
            opacity: 1;
        }

        .dropdown-item {
            padding: 9px 4px 9px 16px;
            font-family: 'DM Sans', sans-serif;
            font-size: 13px;
            color: var(--surface-0);
            cursor: pointer;
            text-align: left;
            transition: background-color 0.15s;
            border-radius: 4px;
        }

        .dropdown-item:hover {
            background-color: var(--purple-10);
        }

        .dropdown-item.selected {
            background-color: var(--purple-5);
        }

        .dropdown-item:last-child {
            border-bottom-left-radius: 4px;
            border-bottom-right-radius: 4px;
        }

        .dropdown-item.hidden {
            display: none;
        }

        .custom-seats-input {
            position: absolute;
            top: 100%;
            left: 0;
            right: 0;
            background: var(--white);
            border: 1px solid var(--grey-20);
            border-top: none;
            border-bottom-left-radius: 7px;
            border-bottom-right-radius: 7px;
            padding: 9px;
            display: flex;
            gap: 8px;
            z-index: 100;
        }

        .custom-seats-input input {
            flex: 1;
            padding: 6px 10px;
            border: 1px solid var(--grey-20);
            border-radius: 4px;
            font-family: 'DM Sans', sans-serif;
            font-size: 13px;
            color: var(--surface-0);
            background: var(--white);
            min-width: 0;
            -moz-appearance: textfield;
            caret-color: var(--surface-0);
        }

        .custom-seats-input input::-webkit-outer-spin-button,
        .custom-seats-input input::-webkit-inner-spin-button {
            -webkit-appearance: none;
            margin: 0;
        }

        .custom-seats-input input:focus {
            outline: none;
            border-color: var(--grey-20);
        }

        .custom-seats-input input::placeholder {
            color: #9ca3af;
        }

        
        /* Plans Grid - show less plans (upgrades only) */
        .plans-grid {
            display: flex;
            max-width: 100%;
            margin: 0 auto;
            align-items: stretch;
            gap: 12px;
            padding: 24px 24px;
        }

        /* Plans Grid - show all plans */
        .plans-grid.show-all {
            padding: 24px 24px;
            align-items: stretch;
        }

        /* Plan Card - features section has fixed height for alignment */
        .plan-card {
            display: flex;
            width: 250px;
            min-width: 250px;
            flex-direction: column;
            align-items: flex-start;
            flex-shrink: 0;
            border-radius: 8px;
            border: 1px solid var(--purple-5);
            background: var(--white);
            box-shadow: 0 0 20px 0 rgba(106, 105, 106, 0.12);
        }

        /* Plan Title Section - exact specs */
        .plan-title-section {
            display: flex;
            padding: 20px 16px;
            flex-direction: column;
            align-items: flex-start;
            gap: 8px;
            align-self: stretch;
        }

        .plan-name {
            color: var(--surface-0);
            font-family: inherit;
            font-size: 22px;
            font-style: normal;
            font-weight: 500;
            line-height: 28px;
        }

        /* Price Section */
        .plan-pricing {
            display: flex;
            padding: 14px 16px;
            flex-direction: column;
            align-items: flex-start;
            gap: 2px;
            align-self: stretch;
            height: 94px;
            border-top: 1px solid var(--purple-10);
        }

        .plan-price {
            display: flex;
            align-items: baseline;
            gap: 4px;
        }

        .price-amount {
            color: var(--surface-0);
            font-family: inherit;
            font-size: 24px;
            font-style: normal;
            font-weight: 700;
            line-height: 28px;
        }

        .price-period {
            color: var(--surface-0);
            font-family: inherit;
            font-size: 15px;
            font-style: normal;
            font-weight: 700;
            line-height: 22px;
        }

        .price-amount-custom {
            color: var(--surface-0);
            font-family: inherit;
            font-size: 15px;
            font-style: normal;
            font-weight: 700;
            line-height: 22px;
        }

        .plan-total {
            color: #1C1B1F;
            font-family: inherit;
            font-size: 14px;
            font-style: normal;
            font-weight: 300;
            line-height: 22px;
        }

        /* Features Section - fixed height with top-aligned content */
        .plan-features-section {
            display: flex;
            padding: 20px 22px;
            flex-direction: column;
            justify-content: flex-start;
            align-items: flex-start;
            gap: 8px;
            align-self: stretch;
            height: 220px;
            border-top: 1px solid var(--purple-10);
        }

        .plan-includes {
            font-family: inherit;
            font-size: 13px;
            font-weight: 400;
            color: var(--surface-0);
        }

        .plan-features {
            list-style: none;
            display: flex;
            flex-direction: column;
            gap: 6px;
            width: 100%;
        }

        .plan-features li {
            font-family: inherit;
            font-size: 13px;
            font-weight: 400;
            color: var(--surface-0);
            line-height: 24px;
            display: flex;
            align-items: flex-start;
            gap: 6px;
        }

        .plan-features li::before {
            content: '•';
            color: var(--surface-0);
            font-weight: bold;
        }

        .plan-features li.plus-bullet::before {
            content: '+';
            font-weight: 300;
        }

        .feature-with-icon {
            display: inline-flex;
            align-items: center;
            gap: 4px;
        }

        .ai-icon {
            display: inline-flex;
            align-items: center;
            flex-shrink: 0;
        }

        .ai-icon svg {
            width: 14px;
            height: 14px;
        }

        /* Button Section */
        .plan-bottom {
            margin-top: auto;
            align-self: stretch;
            display: flex;
            flex-direction: column;
        }

        .plan-actions {
            padding: 14px 12px;
            align-self: stretch;
            border-top: 1px solid var(--purple-10);
        }

        /* Upgrade Button - exact specs */
        .btn-upgrade {
            display: flex;
            height: 40px;
            padding: 4px 16px;
            justify-content: center;
            align-items: center;
            gap: 8px;
            flex-shrink: 0;
            align-self: stretch;
            width: 100%;
            border: none;
            border-radius: 6px;
            background: linear-gradient(34deg, #FF8651 7.91%, #DD98FF 68.34%, #A397F5 84.03%);
            background-size: 200% 200%;
            color: var(--white);
            font-family: inherit;
            font-size: 13px;
            font-weight: 400;
            cursor: pointer;
            transition: background-position 0.5s ease, color 0.2s ease;
        }

        .btn-upgrade:hover {
            background-position: 100% 50%;
            color: var(--surface-0);
            animation: gradientMove 1.5s ease infinite;
        }

        @keyframes gradientMove {
            0% {
                background-position: 0% 50%;
            }
            50% {
                background-position: 100% 50%;
            }
            100% {
                background-position: 0% 50%;
            }
        }

        /* Contact Sales Button - gradient style */
        .btn-contact {
            display: flex;
            height: 40px;
            padding: 4px 16px;
            justify-content: center;
            align-items: center;
            gap: 8px;
            flex-shrink: 0;
            align-self: stretch;
            width: 100%;
            border: none;
            border-radius: 6px;
            background: linear-gradient(34deg, #FF8651 7.91%, #DD98FF 68.34%, #A397F5 84.03%);
            color: var(--white);
            font-family: inherit;
            font-size: 13px;
            font-weight: 400;
            cursor: pointer;
        }

        .btn-contact:hover {
            background: linear-gradient(34deg, #FF8651 7.91%, #DD98FF 68.34%, #A397F5 84.03%);
            color: var(--surface-0);
        }

        /* Your Plan Button */
        .btn-current-plan {
            display: flex;
            height: 40px;
            padding: 4px 16px;
            justify-content: center;
            align-items: center;
            gap: 8px;
            flex-shrink: 0;
            align-self: stretch;
            width: 100%;
            border-radius: 6px;
            border: none;
            background: #9747FF;
            color: var(--white);
            font-family: inherit;
            font-size: 13px;
            font-weight: 400;
            cursor: default;
        }

        /* Downgrade Button */
        .btn-downgrade {
            display: flex;
            height: 40px;
            padding: 4px 16px;
            justify-content: center;
            align-items: center;
            gap: 8px;
            flex-shrink: 0;
            align-self: stretch;
            width: 100%;
            border-radius: 6px;
            border: none;
            background: var(--Grey-80, #5A595B);
            color: var(--white);
            font-family: inherit;
            font-size: 13px;
            font-weight: 400;
            cursor: pointer;
            transition: color 0.2s;
        }

        .btn-downgrade:hover {
            color: var(--Grey-40, #B6B5B7);
        }

        /* Plan Footer - exact specs */
        .plan-footer {
            display: flex;
            padding: 14px 12px;
            padding-top: 39px;
            flex-direction: column;
            justify-content: center;
            align-items: flex-start;
            gap: 1px;
            align-self: stretch;
        }

        .plan-footer-text {
            font-family: inherit;
            font-size: 11px;
            font-weight: 400;
            color: #9ca3af;
            text-align: left;
            line-height: 1.4;
            width: 100%;
        }

        /* Enterprise plan footer - extra padding to align with other cards */
        .plan-card[data-plan-id="enterprise"] .plan-footer {
            padding-top: 29px;
        }

        /* Show Plans Toggle - exact specs */
        .show-plans-toggle {
            text-align: center;
            padding: 0 0 32px 0;
        }

        .show-plans-btn {
            background: none;
            border: none;
            color: var(--purple-dark);
            text-align: center;
            font-family: inherit;
            font-size: 14px;
            font-style: normal;
            font-weight: 400;
            line-height: 18px;
            cursor: pointer;
            padding: 8px 16px;
        }

        .show-plans-btn:hover {
            opacity: 0.8;
        }

        /* Empty state when on Enterprise */
        .no-upgrades-message {
            text-align: center;
            padding: 60px 20px;
            color: #6b7280;
        }

        .no-upgrades-message h3 {
            font-family: inherit;
            font-size: 18px;
            font-weight: 500;
            color: var(--surface-0);
            margin-bottom: 8px;
        }

        .no-upgrades-message p {
            font-family: inherit;
            font-size: 14px;
        }

        /* ============ RESPONSIVE STYLES ============ */

        /* Plans stay centered, scroll when needed without cutting off edges */
        .plans-grid {
            flex-wrap: nowrap;
            overflow-x: auto;
            -webkit-overflow-scrolling: touch;
            scrollbar-width: none;
            -ms-overflow-style: none;
        }

        .plans-grid::-webkit-scrollbar {
            display: none;
        }

        /* Center content using auto margins - works with overflow scroll */
        .plan-card:first-child,
        .no-upgrades-message {
            margin-left: auto;
        }

        .plan-card:last-child,
        .no-upgrades-message {
            margin-right: auto;
        }

        /* Tablet - reflow header */
        @media (max-width: 900px) {
            .billing-header {
                flex-direction: column;
                align-items: flex-start;
                gap: 16px;
                padding: 24px 24px 24px 24px;
            }

            .team-size-wrapper {
                position: static;
                transform: none;
            }

            .billing-period-toggle {
                position: relative;
                top: auto;
                right: auto;
            }
        }

        /* Mobile - reduce padding only */
        @media (max-width: 480px) {
            .billing-container {
                padding: 0;
            }

            .billing-title {
                width: 100%;
                text-align: center;
                border-bottom: 1px solid var(--grey-20);
            }

            .billing-card {
                border-radius: 0;
            }

            .billing-header {
                padding: 20px 20px 20px 20px;
            }

            .plans-grid {
                padding: 24px 16px;
            }

            .current-plan-info {
                flex-direction: row;
                align-items: baseline;
                gap: 8px;
            }
        }
    </style>
</head>

<body>
    <!-- Loader -->
    <div id="loader-container">
        <div class="loader-spinner"></div>
        <div class="loader-text">Loading billing information...</div>
    </div>

    <!-- App -->
    <div id="app-root">
        <div class="billing-container">
            <h1 class="billing-title">Billing</h1>

            <div class="billing-card">
                <div class="billing-header">
                    <div class="current-plan-info">
                        <span class="current-plan-label">Current plan</span>
                        <span class="current-plan-name" id="current-plan-display">Free</span>
                    </div>

                    <div class="team-size-wrapper">
                        <div class="team-size-selector">
                            <span class="team-size-label">Simulate price by</span>
                            <div class="team-size-dropdown" id="team-size-dropdown">
                                <button class="dropdown-button" id="dropdown-button" type="button">
                                    <span id="dropdown-selected">1 seat</span>
                                    <span class="dropdown-arrow"></span>
                                </button>
                                <div class="dropdown-menu" id="dropdown-menu">
                                    <div class="dropdown-item selected" data-value="1">1 seat</div>
                                    <div class="dropdown-item" data-value="3">3 seats</div>
                                    <div class="dropdown-item" data-value="5">5 seats</div>
                                    <div class="dropdown-item" data-value="10">10 seats</div>
                                    <div class="dropdown-item" data-value="20">20 seats</div>
                                    <div class="dropdown-item" data-value="custom">Custom</div>
                                </div>
                                <div class="custom-seats-input" id="custom-seats-input" style="display: none;">
                                    <input type="number" id="custom-seats-number" min="1" max="1000" placeholder="Enter seats, press Enter">
                                </div>
                            </div>
                        </div>
                    </div>

                    <div class="billing-period-toggle yearly" id="billing-period-toggle">
                        <div class="toggle-slider"></div>
                        <button class="toggle-option" data-period="monthly">Monthly</button>
                        <button class="toggle-option active" data-period="yearly">Annually</button>
                    </div>
                </div>

                <div class="plans-grid" id="plans-container">
                    <!-- Plans will be rendered here -->
                </div>

                <div class="show-plans-toggle">
                    <button class="show-plans-btn" id="toggle-plans-btn">Show all plans</button>
                </div>
            </div>
        </div>
    </div>

    <script>
        (function() {
            // ============ PRIVATE STATE ============
            let allPlans = [];
            let currentPlanId = 'free';
            let showAllPlans = false;
            let isInitialized = false;
            let selectedTeamSize = '1';
            let minSeats = 0;
            let currentSeats = 0;
            let billingPeriod = 'yearly'; // 'monthly' or 'yearly'

            // ============ PLAN DEFINITIONS ============
            const DEFAULT_PLANS = [
                {
                    id: 'starter',
                    name: 'Starter',
                    pricePerSeat: 32,
                    yearlyPricePerSeat: 28,
                    annualPrice: 336,
                    includesText: 'Includes Free, plus:',
                    tokens: 100,
                    componentsPerSeat: 20,
                    features: [
                        '{components} components',
                        'Unlimited variants',
                        'Unlimited AI (BYOT*)',
                        'User management',
                        'Rollout system',
                        '{tokens} Myop credits'
                    ],
                    buttonType: 'upgrade'
                },
                {
                    id: 'scale',
                    name: 'Scale',
                    pricePerSeat: 91,
                    yearlyPricePerSeat: 79,
                    annualPrice: 948,
                    includesText: 'Includes Starter, plus:',
                    tokens: 500,
                    componentsPerSeat: 100,
                    features: [
                        '{components} components',
                        'Unlimited variants',
                        'Unlimited AI (BYOT*)',
                        'Automated test runner',
                        'Git sync',
                        'Analytics',
                        '{tokens} Myop credits'
                    ],
                    buttonType: 'upgrade'
                },
                {
                    id: 'unlimited',
                    name: 'Unlimited',
                    pricePerSeat: null,
                    yearlyPricePerSeat: null,
                    flatPrice: 890,
                    annualPrice: null,
                    includesText: 'All inclusive:',
                    tokens: 5000,
                    componentsPerSeat: null,
                    features: [
                        'Unlimited seats',
                        'Unlimited components',
                        'Unlimited variants',
                        'Unlimited AI (BYOT*)',
                        '5,000 Myop credits'
                    ],
                    buttonType: 'upgrade'
                },
                {
                    id: 'enterprise',
                    name: 'Enterprise',
                    pricePerSeat: null,
                    yearlyPricePerSeat: null,
                    annualPrice: null,
                    includesText: 'Custom features:',
                    tokens: null,
                    customPriceText: 'Enterprise pricing',
                    features: [
                        'On-premises solution',
                        'Dedicated support',
                        'Onboarding services',
                        'Localization engine',
                        'Custom integrations'
                    ],
                    buttonType: 'contact',
                    footerText: null
                }
            ];

            // ============ DOM REFERENCES ============
            const loaderEl = document.getElementById('loader-container');
            const appEl = document.getElementById('app-root');
            const plansContainerEl = document.getElementById('plans-container');
            const currentPlanDisplayEl = document.getElementById('current-plan-display');
            const togglePlansBtnEl = document.getElementById('toggle-plans-btn');
            const dropdownButtonEl = document.getElementById('dropdown-button');
            const dropdownMenuEl = document.getElementById('dropdown-menu');
            const dropdownSelectedEl = document.getElementById('dropdown-selected');
            const dropdownItems = document.querySelectorAll('.dropdown-item');
            let isDropdownOpen = false;

            // ============ PRIVATE FUNCTIONS ============
            function hideLoader() {
                loaderEl.classList.add('hidden');
                appEl.classList.add('visible');
            }

            function getPlanIndex(planId) {
                return allPlans.findIndex(p => p.id === planId);
            }

            function getVisiblePlans() {
                const currentIndex = getPlanIndex(currentPlanId);

                if (showAllPlans) {
                    return allPlans;
                }

                // Show plans above current plan, plus current plan if user selected more seats
                const teamSize = parseInt(selectedTeamSize) || 1;
                const canAddSeats = currentSeats > 0 && teamSize > currentSeats;

                return allPlans.filter((plan, index) => {
                    if (index > currentIndex) return true;
                    if (index === currentIndex && canAddSeats) return true;
                    return false;
                });
            }

            function renderPlanCard(plan, isCurrentPlan, isDowngrade) {
                const teamSize = parseInt(selectedTeamSize) || 1;

                // Calculate total components
                const totalComponents = plan.componentsPerSeat ? plan.componentsPerSeat * teamSize : null;

                // Calculate cost per component (yearly price * team size / total components)
                let costPerComponent = null;
                if (plan.yearlyPricePerSeat && plan.componentsPerSeat) {
                    const displayPrice = billingPeriod === 'monthly' ? plan.pricePerSeat : plan.yearlyPricePerSeat;
                    costPerComponent = (displayPrice * teamSize) / totalComponents;
                }

                // Price display with large number and smaller text
                let priceHtml = '';

                // For teams of 11+ seats, show flat rate pricing for Unlimited plan
                const showFlatRate = plan.flatPrice && teamSize >= 11;

                if (plan.flatPrice) {
                    // Flat rate plan (Unlimited) - always billed annually for 11+ seats
                    priceHtml = `
                        <div class="plan-price">
                            <span class="price-amount">$${plan.flatPrice}</span><span class="price-period">/month</span>
                        </div>
                        <div class="plan-total">Flat rate</div>
                        <div class="plan-total">Billed annually</div>
                    `;
                } else if (plan.pricePerSeat !== null) {
                    const monthlyPrice = plan.pricePerSeat;
                    // Use specific yearly price from plan definition
                    const yearlyPrice = plan.yearlyPricePerSeat;

                    // For teams of more than 10 seats, show flat rate $890/month
                    if (teamSize > 10) {
                        priceHtml = `
                            <div class="plan-price">
                                <span class="price-amount">$890</span><span class="price-period">/month</span>
                            </div>
                            <div class="plan-total">Flat rate</div>
                            <div class="plan-total">Billed annually</div>
                        `;
                    } else {
                        const displayPrice = billingPeriod === 'monthly' ? monthlyPrice : yearlyPrice;
                        const totalMonthly = displayPrice * teamSize;
                        const billedText = billingPeriod === 'yearly' ? 'Billed annually' : 'Billed monthly';
                        priceHtml = `
                            <div class="plan-price">
                                <span class="price-amount">$${displayPrice}</span><span class="price-period">/month</span>
                            </div>
                            <div class="plan-total">Total $${totalMonthly}/month</div>
                            <div class="plan-total">${billedText}</div>
                        `;
                    }
                } else {
                    priceHtml = `
                        <div class="plan-price">
                            <span class="price-amount-custom">${plan.customPriceText || 'Tailored Pricing'}</span>
                        </div>
                    `;
                }

                let buttonHtml = '';
                const teamSizeNum = parseInt(selectedTeamSize) || 1;
                const canAddSeats = currentSeats > 0 && teamSizeNum > currentSeats;
                if (isCurrentPlan && canAddSeats) {
                    buttonHtml = `<button class="btn-upgrade" data-plan-id="${plan.id}" data-action="upgrade">Add seats</button>`;
                } else if (isCurrentPlan) {
                    buttonHtml = `<button class="btn-current-plan">Your plan</button>`;
                } else if (isDowngrade) {
                    buttonHtml = `<button class="btn-downgrade" data-plan-id="${plan.id}" data-action="downgrade">Downgrade</button>`;
                } else if (plan.buttonType === 'contact') {
                    buttonHtml = `<button class="btn-contact" data-plan-id="${plan.id}" data-action="contact_sales">Contact sales</button>`;
                } else {
                    buttonHtml = `<button class="btn-upgrade" data-plan-id="${plan.id}" data-action="upgrade">Upgrade</button>`;
                }

                const cardClasses = ['plan-card'].join(' ');

                // Build footer content
                let footerContent = '';
                if (plan.id === 'starter' || plan.id === 'scale' || plan.id === 'unlimited') {
                    footerContent = `
                        <p class="plan-footer-text">*Bring Your Own Token: use your existing AI tool (Claude, Gemini, Cursor)</p>
                    `;
                } else {
                    footerContent = '';
                }

                return `
                    <div class="${cardClasses}" data-plan-id="${plan.id}">
                        <div class="plan-title-section">
                            <h3 class="plan-name">${plan.name}</h3>
                        </div>

                        <div class="plan-pricing">
                            ${priceHtml}
                        </div>

                        <div class="plan-features-section">
                            ${plan.includesText ? `<div class="plan-includes">${plan.includesText}</div>` : ''}

                            <ul class="plan-features">
                                ${plan.features.map(f => {
                                    // Replace {components} placeholder with total components
                                    let componentCount = totalComponents || plan.componentsPerSeat || '';
                                    let featureText = f.replace('{components}', componentCount);
                                    // Replace {tokens} placeholder with total credits
                                    const totalCredits = plan.tokens ? plan.tokens * teamSize : null;
                                    if (totalCredits && featureText.includes('{tokens}')) {
                                        featureText = featureText.replace('{tokens}', totalCredits);
                                    }
                                    // Add AI icon for AI credits feature - use + instead of bullet
                                    if (featureText.includes('Myop credits')) {
                                        return `<li class="plus-bullet"><span class="feature-with-icon">${featureText}<span class="ai-icon"><svg width="16" height="16" viewBox="0 0 16 16" fill="none" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"><g clip-path="url(#clip0_6739_117816)"><path d="M5 10C5.65661 10 6.30679 9.87067 6.91342 9.6194C7.52005 9.36812 8.07124 8.99983 8.53553 8.53553C8.99983 8.07124 9.36812 7.52005 9.6194 6.91342C9.87067 6.30679 10 5.65661 10 5C10 6.32608 10.5268 7.59785 11.4645 8.53553C12.4021 9.47322 13.6739 10 15 10C13.6739 10 12.4021 10.5268 11.4645 11.4645C10.5268 12.4021 10 13.6739 10 15C10 14.3434 9.87067 13.6932 9.6194 13.0866C9.36812 12.48 8.99983 11.9288 8.53553 11.4645C8.07124 11.0002 7.52005 10.6319 6.91342 10.3806C6.30679 10.1293 5.65661 10 5 10Z" stroke="#3E3D3E" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"/><path d="M1 4C1.79565 4 2.55871 3.68393 3.12132 3.12132C3.68393 2.55871 4 1.79565 4 1C4 1.79565 4.31607 2.55871 4.87868 3.12132C5.44129 3.68393 6.20435 4 7 4C6.20435 4 5.44129 4.31607 4.87868 4.87868C4.31607 5.44129 4 6.20435 4 7C4 6.20435 3.68393 5.44129 3.12132 4.87868C2.55871 4.31607 1.79565 4 1 4Z" stroke="#3E3D3E" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"/><circle cx="3" cy="13" r="1" stroke="#3E3D3E"/></g><defs><clipPath id="clip0_6739_117816"><rect width="16" height="16" fill="white"/></clipPath></defs></svg></span></span></li>`;
                                    }
                                    return `<li>${featureText}</li>`;
                                }).join('')}
                            </ul>
                        </div>

                        <div class="plan-bottom">
                            <div class="plan-footer">
                                ${footerContent}
                            </div>

                            <div class="plan-actions">
                                ${buttonHtml}
                            </div>
                        </div>
                    </div>
                `;
            }

            function render() {
                const visiblePlans = getVisiblePlans();

                if (visiblePlans.length === 0) {
                    plansContainerEl.innerHTML = `
                        <div class="no-upgrades-message">
                            <h3>You're on our top plan!</h3>
                            <p>Contact your account manager for any custom requirements.</p>
                        </div>
                    `;
                    togglePlansBtnEl.textContent = 'Show all plans';
                    return;
                }

                const plansHtml = visiblePlans.map(plan => {
                    const isCurrentPlan = plan.id === currentPlanId;
                    const currentIndex = getPlanIndex(currentPlanId);
                    const planIndex = getPlanIndex(plan.id);
                    const isDowngrade = showAllPlans && planIndex < currentIndex;
                    return renderPlanCard(plan, isCurrentPlan, isDowngrade);
                }).join('');

                plansContainerEl.innerHTML = plansHtml;
                plansContainerEl.classList.toggle('show-all', showAllPlans);
                togglePlansBtnEl.textContent = showAllPlans ? 'Show less' : 'Show all plans';

                // Update current plan display
                const currentPlan = allPlans.find(p => p.id === currentPlanId);
                if (currentPlan) {
                    currentPlanDisplayEl.textContent = currentPlan.name;
                }
            }

            function initialize(data) {
                // Set plans (use provided or defaults)
                allPlans = data.plans || DEFAULT_PLANS;

                // Set current plan
                if (data.currentPlanId) {
                    currentPlanId = data.currentPlanId;
                }

                // Set team size if provided
                if (data.teamSize) {
                    selectedTeamSize = data.teamSize;
                    const item = document.querySelector(`.dropdown-item[data-value="${data.teamSize}"]`);
                    if (item) {
                        document.querySelectorAll('.dropdown-item').forEach(i => i.classList.remove('selected'));
                        item.classList.add('selected');
                        dropdownSelectedEl.textContent = item.textContent;
                    }
                }

                // Set minimum seats (for upgrades - can't go below current)
                if (data.minSeats) {
                    minSeats = parseInt(data.minSeats) || 0;
                    // Disable dropdown items below minSeats
                    document.querySelectorAll('.dropdown-item').forEach(item => {
                        const val = parseInt(item.dataset.value);
                        if (val < minSeats) {
                            item.classList.add('disabled');
                            item.style.opacity = '0.4';
                            item.style.pointerEvents = 'none';
                        } else {
                            item.classList.remove('disabled');
                            item.style.opacity = '';
                            item.style.pointerEvents = '';
                        }
                    });
                    // Update custom input min
                    const customInput = document.getElementById('custom-seats-number');
                    if (customInput) customInput.min = minSeats;
                    // If current selection is below min, bump it up
                    if (parseInt(selectedTeamSize) < minSeats) {
                        selectedTeamSize = String(minSeats);
                        const validItem = document.querySelector(`.dropdown-item[data-value="${minSeats}"]`);
                        if (validItem) {
                            document.querySelectorAll('.dropdown-item').forEach(i => i.classList.remove('selected'));
                            validItem.classList.add('selected');
                            dropdownSelectedEl.textContent = validItem.textContent;
                        } else {
                            dropdownSelectedEl.textContent = `${minSeats} seats`;
                        }
                    }
                }

                // Set current seats count
                if (data.currentSeats) {
                    currentSeats = parseInt(data.currentSeats) || 0;
                }

                // Set show all plans if provided
                if (data.showAllPlans !== undefined) {
                    showAllPlans = data.showAllPlans;
                }

                // Set billing period if provided
                if (data.billingPeriod) {
                    billingPeriod = data.billingPeriod;
                    const billingToggleEl = document.getElementById('billing-period-toggle');
                    billingToggleEl.classList.toggle('yearly', billingPeriod === 'yearly');
                    document.querySelectorAll('.toggle-option').forEach(o => {
                        o.classList.toggle('active', o.dataset.period === billingPeriod);
                    });
                }

                // Attach event listeners (only once)
                if (!isInitialized) {
                    // Toggle show all plans
                    togglePlansBtnEl.addEventListener('click', () => {
                        showAllPlans = !showAllPlans;
                        render();
                    });

                    // Plan action clicks (event delegation)
                    plansContainerEl.addEventListener('click', (e) => {
                        const btn = e.target.closest('[data-action]');
                        if (btn) {
                            const action = btn.dataset.action;
                            const planId = btn.dataset.planId;
                            window.myop_cta_handler(action, { planId, teamSize: selectedTeamSize, billingPeriod });
                        }
                    });

                    // Custom dropdown toggle
                    dropdownButtonEl.addEventListener('click', (e) => {
                        e.stopPropagation();
                        isDropdownOpen = !isDropdownOpen;
                        dropdownButtonEl.classList.toggle('open', isDropdownOpen);
                        dropdownMenuEl.classList.toggle('open', isDropdownOpen);
                    });

                    // Custom seats input elements
                    const customSeatsInputEl = document.getElementById('custom-seats-input');
                    const customSeatsNumberEl = document.getElementById('custom-seats-number');

                    // Dropdown item selection
                    dropdownMenuEl.addEventListener('click', (e) => {
                        const item = e.target.closest('.dropdown-item');
                        if (item) {
                            const value = item.dataset.value;
                            // Block selection below minSeats
                            if (value !== 'custom' && minSeats && parseInt(value) < minSeats) return;
                            const text = item.textContent;

                            // Update selected state
                            document.querySelectorAll('.dropdown-item').forEach(i => i.classList.remove('selected'));
                            item.classList.add('selected');

                            // Handle "Custom" option
                            if (value === 'custom') {
                                // Close dropdown menu, show custom input
                                dropdownMenuEl.classList.remove('open');
                                customSeatsInputEl.style.display = 'flex';
                                customSeatsNumberEl.focus();
                                dropdownSelectedEl.textContent = 'Custom';
                                return;
                            }

                            // Hide custom input if visible
                            customSeatsInputEl.style.display = 'none';

                            // Update button text
                            dropdownSelectedEl.textContent = text;

                            // Close dropdown
                            isDropdownOpen = false;
                            dropdownButtonEl.classList.remove('open');
                            dropdownMenuEl.classList.remove('open');

                            // Update state and emit event
                            selectedTeamSize = value;
                            window.myop_cta_handler('team_size_changed', { teamSize: selectedTeamSize, billingPeriod });
                            render(); // Re-render to update totals
                        }
                    });

                    // Apply custom seats on Enter key
                    customSeatsNumberEl.addEventListener('keypress', (e) => {
                        if (e.key === 'Enter') {
                            const customValue = parseInt(customSeatsNumberEl.value);
                            const minVal = minSeats || 1;
                            if (customValue && customValue >= minVal && customValue <= 1000) {
                                selectedTeamSize = customValue.toString();
                                const seatText = customValue === 1 ? '1 seat' : `${customValue} seats`;
                                dropdownSelectedEl.textContent = seatText;

                                // Close everything
                                isDropdownOpen = false;
                                dropdownButtonEl.classList.remove('open');
                                customSeatsInputEl.style.display = 'none';

                                // Clear the input
                                customSeatsNumberEl.value = '';

                                // Emit event and re-render
                                window.myop_cta_handler('team_size_changed', { teamSize: selectedTeamSize, billingPeriod });
                                render();
                            }
                        }
                    });

                    // Close dropdown when clicking outside
                    document.addEventListener('click', (e) => {
                        if (!e.target.closest('.team-size-dropdown')) {
                            isDropdownOpen = false;
                            dropdownButtonEl.classList.remove('open');
                            dropdownMenuEl.classList.remove('open');
                            customSeatsInputEl.style.display = 'none';
                        }
                    });

                    // Billing period toggle
                    const billingToggleEl = document.getElementById('billing-period-toggle');
                    billingToggleEl.addEventListener('click', (e) => {
                        const option = e.target.closest('.toggle-option');
                        if (option && !option.classList.contains('active')) {
                            // Update active state
                            document.querySelectorAll('.toggle-option').forEach(o => o.classList.remove('active'));
                            option.classList.add('active');

                            // Update slider position
                            billingToggleEl.classList.toggle('yearly', option.dataset.period === 'yearly');

                            // Update billing period
                            billingPeriod = option.dataset.period;
                            window.myop_cta_handler('billing_period_changed', { billingPeriod });
                            render();
                        }
                    });

                    isInitialized = true;
                }

                render();
                hideLoader();
            }

            // ============ PUBLIC API ============
            window.myop_init_interface = function(data) {
                if (arguments.length === 0) {
                    // Getter mode
                    return {
                        currentPlanId,
                        teamSize: selectedTeamSize,
                        showAllPlans,
                        billingPeriod,
                        plans: allPlans
                    };
                }

                // Handle action-based updates
                if (data.action) {
                    switch (data.action) {
                        case 'setCurrentPlan':
                            currentPlanId = data.payload;
                            showAllPlans = false;
                            render();
                            break;
                        case 'setTeamSize':
                            selectedTeamSize = data.payload;
                            const item = document.querySelector(`.dropdown-item[data-value="${data.payload}"]`);
                            if (item) {
                                document.querySelectorAll('.dropdown-item').forEach(i => i.classList.remove('selected'));
                                item.classList.add('selected');
                                dropdownSelectedEl.textContent = item.textContent;
                            }
                            break;
                        case 'showAllPlans':
                            showAllPlans = true;
                            render();
                            break;
                        case 'showUpgradesOnly':
                            showAllPlans = false;
                            render();
                            break;
                        case 'setBillingPeriod':
                            billingPeriod = data.payload;
                            const toggleEl = document.getElementById('billing-period-toggle');
                            toggleEl.classList.toggle('yearly', billingPeriod === 'yearly');
                            document.querySelectorAll('.toggle-option').forEach(o => {
                                o.classList.toggle('active', o.dataset.period === billingPeriod);
                            });
                            render();
                            break;
                    }
                    return;
                }

                // Standard initialization
                initialize(data);
            };

            window.myop_cta_handler = function(action_id, payload) {
                console.log('[Billing CTA]', action_id, payload);

                if (action_id === 'contact_sales') {
                    window.open('https://calendly.com/myopdev/demo', '_blank');
                }
            };

            console.log('[Billing Component] Ready');
        })();
    </script>

    <!-- NO PREVIEW SCRIPT - Myop will call myop_init_interface directly -->

    <script id="myop_preview">
        window.myop_init_interface({
            currentPlanId: 'free',
            teamSize: '1',
            billingPeriod: 'yearly',
            showAllPlans: false
        });
    </script>
</body>

</html>
